case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. XIOMARA AUXILIADORA OROZCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT OROZCO, XIOMARA AUXILIADORA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER DENYING REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SC-105) WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT MAY COME TO COURT AT THE REGULAR HEARING ON 11/28/18 TO EXPLAIN IF SHE DOES NOT OWE THE DEBT.
(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER FILED BY DEFENDANT OROZCO, XIOMARA AUXILIADORA AS TO PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
(SC-105) ANSWER TO REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER FILED BY DEFENDANT OROZCO, XIOMARA AUXILIADORA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC REPRESENTED BY JHANTTAN HERRADA, COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
